name: wifi-qr
description: Generate a WiFi QR code PNG phones can scan to join a network instantly. Self-contained uv script, no pre-installed packages needed.

interface.shortDescription: Generate a WiFi QR code PNG phones can scan to join a network instantly. Self-contained uv script, no pre-installed packages needed.
interface.longDescription: Generate a WiFi QR code PNG phones can scan to join a network instantly. Self-contained uv script, no pre-installed packages needed. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Generate a WiFi QR code PNG from an SSID and password, and save it to a path I specify.
